chunks.text: HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Present: Justice Jawad Akbar Sarwana 1st Appeal No.51 of 2023 Appellants: Syed Noor Kazim s/o Syed Ahmed Ali Shah (Deceased) through LRs: - a) Syed Ghayasuddin s/o Syed Noor Kazim. Nemo. b) Syed Moinuddin s/o Syed Noor Kazim Through M/s Jaleel Ahmed Memon, Ghulam Mustafa Burdi, Syed Jan Muhammad Bukhari and Rakesh Kumar Lohana, Advocates, c) Syed Mohiuddin s/o Syed Noor Kazim. Nemo. d) Syed Salahuddin s/o Syed Noor Kazim. Nemo. e) Sabiha d/o Syed Noor Kazim. Nemo. f) Shagufta d/o Syed Noor Kazim (deceased) through LRs: - a) Ammar s/o Shoaib Siddiqui. Nemo. b) Basil s/o Shoaib Siddiqui. Nemo. c) Hir d/o Shoaib Siddiqui (Minor). Nemo Respondent: Muhammad Saleem s/o Abdullah, Arain In person Date of hearing: 04.11.2025, 26.11.2025, 12.12.2025, 18.12.2025, 23.12.2025, 26.12.2025 29.12.2025 Date of Short Order: 02.01.2026 S H O R T O R D E R JAWAD AKBAR SARWANA, J.: For reasons to be recorded, the 1st appeal is dismissed. JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
